validate-artifacts job checks smoke/gate/journey report files owned by punch-k6-testing

IMPLEMENT hands off to Build prompts + punch-incremental-implementation / punch-test-driven-development
Test phase maps to Agent (run) or Ask (interpret) + punch-test-engineer

Rule 1: host npm only where documented exception allow, see decisions/
No-break invariants: same Critical Rules bind both hosts — Docker-First (governed by ADR 0001)
